summary: Tested OKN marketing site end-to-end. Backend POST/GET /api/contact and all six frontend pages (Home intro/skip/sessionStorage, Nav, Partner mailto buttons, working contact form, closing-CTA + footer) all behave per spec. 8/8 pytest tests pass; live UI flows pass.

issues: Partner page does not render a data-testid='closing-cta' band — only the footer. Requirement says 'each page renders its closing CTA band'. This is most likely intentional (the contact form IS the partner CTA), but flagging since the spec explicitly mentions every page. Footer 'Lock It With Us' is present.

action_items: Optional: decide whether Partner page should also render the shared <ClosingCTA data-testid='closing-cta'> band for consistency with the spec wording, or update the spec note that Partner intentionally omits it because the contact form is the CTA.
critical_code_review_comments: server.py is small and clean. MongoDB _id is correctly excluded in list_contacts via projection.
ContactCreate enforces EmailStr + min_length on name/message — 422 returned correctly on bad input.
Frontend Partner.jsx performs client-side guard (name/email/message) before posting; matches required UX.
Pressing.jsx sessionStorage gate works (intro shown first visit, suppressed on reload). Skip-intro button visible and clickable.

No console/page errors observed across all 6 pages; no broken images detected in DOM (broken count = 0). The many ERR_ABORTED entries in requestfailed are in-flight requests cancelled by route changes during the test, not real broken assets — the rendered screenshots confirm images load.
seed_data_creation: Created several TEST_ prefixed contacts via the API to verify create + list-recent-first persistence. They remain in the test_database.contacts collection.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Backend pytest suite lives at /app/backend/tests/test_contact_api.py and uses REACT_APP_BACKEND_URL from /app/frontend/.env. To rerun: `pytest /app/backend/tests/ -v --junitxml=/app/test_reports/pytest/pytest_results.xml`. Frontend uses sessionStorage key 'okn_intro' to suppress the Pressing intro after first view — clear sessionStorage or use a fresh context to retest the intro.
